title: Crocus’s Bond with Laboon
description: On pages 11–14, crocus’s bond with laboon as crocus explains why Laboon keeps hurting himself and reveals the promise that left the whale waiting at Reverse Mountain.
scene: Crocus’s Bond with Laboon. Crocus explains why Laboon keeps hurting himself and reveals the promise that left the whale waiting at Reverse Mountain. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: If he continues to recklessly bash his head against the wall,

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: We've had an odd relationship, but he's still my companion that I've lived with for over 50 years.

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: I can't just stand by and watch him die...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What's that idiot up to now?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Take your eyes off him for one second and...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Maybe he just likes climbing things?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yeah, I think it's our ship's...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yup, it's our main mast alright.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What the hell is he doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He's going to crash down here!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on crocus’s bond with laboon. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
